problem_statement: The percentages in the report's priority breakdown no longer add up. On any board that contains completed items the percent column sums to well over 100 — for example, with four tasks of which two are finished we see shares like 50% + 50% + 100%. The raw counts printed right next to them are correct; only the share figures are inflated, and the more work we complete the worse the inflation gets. On a board where everything is completed, every share collapses to 0.0% instead. Each band's percentage should simply be its share of all tasks included in the report, so the column always totals roughly one hundred.
notes: group_by_priority percent denominator became open-tasks-only while counts still cover all tasks. | RE-LABELED 2026-07-06 from k=5 calibration (cheap=haiku 5/5, frontier=sonnet 5/5): no routing signal at authored difficulty — measured reality is cheap-solvable. authored_difficulty preserved.
